description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the image registry.gitlab.com/eyeo/docker/adblockplus-ci:node12 with stages prepare, build, test, and publish, defining global variables (GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY, npm_config_*) and a global cache named global‑cache that stores adblockpluscore/*-snapshots/download-cache/, adblockpluscore/chromium-snapshots/chromedriver/ and adblockplusui/node_modules/ and excludes scheduled pipelines. In the prepare stage add a prepare-dependencies job that runs `git clean -x -d -ff`, `git -C adblockpluscore clean -e '/*-snapshots' -x -d -ff`, `git -C adblockplusui clean -x -d -ff`, `npm install`, and `npm run download-test-browsers`, uses the global cache, is interruptible and retries on timeout. In the build stage add build:chrome and build:firefox jobs that set TARGET to chrome or firefox, execute `npx gulp build -t $TARGET -c development` then `npx gulp devenv -t $TARGET`, and publish artifacts `adblockpluschrome-*.zip`/`devenv.chrome/tests/` or `adblockplusfirefox-*.xpi`/`devenv.firefox/tests/`; also add a build:source job that runs `npx gulp source -c development` and publishes `adblockplus-*.tar.gz`. In the test stage add audit (runs `npm audit` and may fail), lint:js (`npm run lint`), lint:yaml (uses yamllint image and runs `yamllint .gitlab-ci.yml`), test:chromium:latest and test:chromium:oldest (run `xvfb-run -a npm run test-only -- -g 'Chromium (latest)'` or `'Chromium (oldest)'`), test:firefox:latest and test:firefox:oldest (run `xvfb-run -a npm run test-only -- -g 'Firefox (latest)'` or `'Firefox (oldest)'`), and test:edge (Windows tags, runs PowerShell `Expand-Archive`, `choco upgrade nodejs --version=12.17.0`, `choco install microsoft-edge --version=79.0.309.71`, then `npm run test-only -- -g 'Edge'`), all extending the default template, using npm install and unzip of the extension file, producing screenshot artifacts on failure. In the publish stage add a docs job that runs `npm run docs` and stores the docs/ directory for one week, and a pages job (from the included .gitlab-pages.yml) that publishes the docs artifact to GitLab Pages, both running only when not triggered by schedules.
